<!-- agent-bridge:managed prompt=agb-done -->
<!-- Managed by agent-bridge. Regenerated by agent-bridge. Do not edit below; -->
<!-- edits are replaced on the next scaffold/upgrade. Your own prompts in this -->
<!-- directory without the agent-bridge:managed marker are left untouched. -->

Close Agent Bridge task `$1` as done with a result note.

`$1` is the task id. `$2` is the completion note (what you actually did or
where you delivered the result). Run the full path (agb is not on your PATH):

    ~/.agent-bridge/agb done $1 --agent <agent-id> --note "$2"

`done` takes `--agent` (not `--actor`). `--note` is REQUIRED — a done with no
note, or a done with no result delivered to the requester, is forbidden. If
the requester is another bridge agent, first send the actual answer as a new
task (`~/.agent-bridge/agb task create --from <agent-id> --to <requester>
--title "<subject>" --body "<result>"`), then close this one with a pointer
note. If the requester is a human, deliver via the connected channel first,
then close with a note saying where you delivered it.
